context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements channel-specific payment timing for multi-channel ecommerce, including exact payout lags, reserve rates, bad debt rates, Amazon bi-weekly disbursement logic, return cash outflows, and ad spend billing lag — rather than using naive averages.

checklist.name: Shopify payout lag
checklist.description: Shopify Payments channel uses a payout lag of exactly 3 days (not 2 or another value)

checklist.name: Amazon FBA payout lag
checklist.description: Amazon FBA channel uses a payout lag of exactly 14 days

checklist.name: Amazon bi-weekly disbursement
checklist.description: Amazon FBA cash dates are snapped to bi-weekly disbursement cycles (not treated as daily or weekly continuous payouts)

checklist.name: eBay reserve holdback
checklist.description: eBay channel applies a 5% hold rate, reducing the expected cash received to 95% of gross revenue

checklist.name: B2B Net-30 payout lag
checklist.description: B2B wholesale (Net-30) channel uses a payout lag of exactly 30 days

checklist.name: B2B bad debt rate
checklist.description: B2B wholesale channel applies a bad debt reduction of 2% (collectable amount = gross * 0.98)

checklist.name: Return cash outflow
checklist.description: Returns are modeled as negative cash entries (cash outflows), not merely deducted from inflows — they appear as separate negative rows in the cash schedule

checklist.name: Return rate applied
checklist.description: Return outflows use the stated 18% return rate on the relevant channel/category revenue

checklist.name: Ad spend billing lag
checklist.description: Ad spend outflow is dated to when the credit card payment clears (billing date + clearing days), not the date the spend was incurred

checklist.name: Per-channel cash dates
checklist.description: Each revenue entry produces a cash receipt date computed as sale date + channel-specific payout lag (not a uniform lag applied to all channels)

checklist.name: Weekly net cash summary
checklist.description: Output includes a weekly summary aggregating net cash (inflows minus outflows) by week
